name: Cursor Brain
description: Use Cursor Agent as the AI brain for OpenClaw via MCP

cursorPath.description: Path to cursor agent binary. Leave empty to auto-detect.

model.description: Primary model (cursor-local/<model>). Usually selected interactively via 'setup' or 'upgrade'. Override here to skip interactive selection.

fallbackModel.description: Fallback model. Usually selected interactively via 'setup' or 'upgrade'. Override here to skip interactive selection.

outputFormat.description: Output format for cursor-agent. Auto-detected if not set. Use 'stream-json' for streaming + thinking blocks, 'json' for batch.

proxyPort.description: Port for the local streaming proxy (OpenAI-compatible). Default 18790.

cursorModel.description: Cursor agent model override (e.g. 'sonnet-4.6', 'opus-4.6'). Leave empty for 'auto'. Append '-thinking' for extended thinking (e.g. 'sonnet-4.6-thinking').
